header: Company Culture that feels ready to ship
subheadline: Gives the people section a sharp editorial voice with credible roles, concise bios, and modern visual support.

items.title: Team signal
items.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.

items.title: Culture proof
items.description: A sharp, production-minded company culture using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so candidates and partners can make the organization feel sharp, human, and credible.

items.title: Leadership note
items.description: Built to show the company culture with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

items.title: People detail
items.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this company culture easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.
